title: MC Base Horror
description: Just the basic mods of the Minecraft horror experience
body:
**The goal of the modpack is to take pictures of the different creatures, you can also k##l them with the weapons in TACZ mod.
**
Just the basics of Minecraft horror mods, some mods that are very popular and well-made. 
You can play with the Your World that has a "profile picture". Just to forget to do /gamemode survival and to active the ressource packs. You can change your shader, I would recomend you to play with hysteria or insanity to have a good horror ambience. Hope you'll enjoy the modpack !
